groups.title: Groups

error.UNAUTHENTICATED: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
error.UNSUPPORTED_IMAGE_TYPE: Only JPG, PNG, WebP or GIF images are allowed.
error.UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE: Only images (JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF) or videos (MP4, WebM) are allowed.
error.EMPTY_POST: A post needs text or at least one media attachment.
error.PAYLOAD_TOO_LARGE: The uploaded file is too large.
error.INVALID_UPLOAD: The upload could not be completed. Please try again.
error.SELF_FRIEND_REQUEST: You cannot send a friend request to yourself.
error.FRIEND_REQUEST_ALREADY_SENT: You have already sent a request to this user.
error.REVERSE_FRIEND_REQUEST_EXISTS: This user has already sent you a request — accept it on the Requests tab.
error.NOT_GROUP_MEMBER: You must be a member of this group to do that.
error.GROUP_LAST_ADMIN: You are the only admin — promote another member or remove the others before leaving.
error.NOT_GROUP_ADMIN: Only a group admin can do that.
error.CANNOT_KICK_SELF: You cannot remove yourself — leave the group instead.
error.CANNOT_KICK_ADMIN: You cannot remove a group admin.
error.TARGET_NOT_GROUP_MEMBER: That user is not a member of this group.
error.INVALID_COMMENT_PARENT: The parent comment does not belong to this post.
error.NETWORK: Could not reach the server. Please try again.
error.UNKNOWN_ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again.
